ui-foundation-bootstrap.last_summary: Verified existing UI mode bootstrap via scripts/refactor/test-ui-mode-smoke.ps1 (PASS: default); resolver and registry mappings are consistent.

ui-mode-wrapper-plumbing.last_summary: Verified wrapper mode plumbing via resolver/lock metadata and guard checks: unsupported family emits BLOCKED_NEEDS_HUMAN; wrong path override emits mode/path conflict; lock carries mode_id/mode_family/task/state/config metadata.

ui-foundation-complete.last_summary: Verified foundation baseline: PASS default + installer-exporter smoke; updated smoke selection assertion to dynamic ready-task resolution; progress doc synced for repo-local boundary and next task.

ui-controls-token-baseline.last_summary: Documented controls token baseline mapping in spec section 5.2.1 with explicit Button/Input/List family-to-style links; confirmed shell-stage dependency chain remains gated behind controls tasks.

ui-controls-button-and-input-family.last_summary: Unified button family through shared base style and replaced settings-dialog inline shadow literals with tokenized resources; verification passed via dotnet build ClassroomToolkit.sln -c Debug and scripts/refactor/test-ui-mode-smoke.ps1.

ui-controls-list-and-menu-family.last_summary: Unified list/tab/menu control family by extracting shared list selection styles, aligning Tab and Menu selected-state grammar, and replacing ImageManager inline ListViewItem template with style reuse; verification passed via dotnet build ClassroomToolkit.sln -c Debug and powershell -File scripts/refactor/test-ui-mode-smoke.ps1.

ui-window-shell-dialog-shell.last_summary: Migrated TimerSet/RemoteKey/AutoExit/About dialogs to shared DialogShell baseline styles with unified title/content/action regions and standardized secondary-primary action ordering; verification passed via dotnet test --filter WindowOrchestratorTests and scripts/refactor/test-ui-mode-smoke.ps1.

ui-window-shell-management-shell.last_summary: Unified management shell baseline for ImageManager, StudentList, and Diagnostics windows with shared header/content/footer styles; verified via dotnet test tests/ClassroomToolkit.Tests/ClassroomToolkit.Tests.csproj -c Debug --filter FullyQualifiedName~WindowOrchestratorTests -p:UseAppHost=false and scripts/refactor/test-ui-mode-smoke.ps1.

ui-window-shell-work-and-fullscreen-shel.last_summary: Split oversized shell migration into two child tasks (work shell first, overlay shell second) for unattended-safe closure.

ui-window-shell-work-main-rollcall-shell.last_summary: Applied shared WorkShell baseline to MainWindow and RollCallWindow (window border/title bar/content host/bottom bar style integration); verified with WindowOrchestrator|MainWindow tests and ui-mode smoke.

ui-window-shell-fullscreen-overlay-shell.last_summary: Unified fullscreen-shell baseline for PaintOverlay and PhotoOverlay control chrome (shared close button/side rail/hint badge styles) while keeping topmost/activation behavior unchanged; verified with WindowOrchestrator|MainWindow tests and ui-mode smoke.

theme-freeze-gate.last_summary: Human approved theme-freeze; resume main-scenes automation.

ui-main-scenes-main-window.last_summary: MainWindow scene already meets target hierarchy (Hero primary actions + compact secondary utility bar); verification passed via MainWindow tests and ui-mode smoke.

ui-main-scenes-rollcall-and-timer.last_summary: RollCall/timer scene already aligned with main-scene hierarchy and compact controls; verification passed via RollCall tests and ui-mode smoke.

ui-main-scenes-toolbar-and-overlay.last_summary: Toolbar/overlay scene already in compact content-first baseline; fullscreen overlay chrome unified via shared shell styles; verification passed via Overlay|Photo tests and ui-mode smoke.

main-scene-freeze-gate.last_summary: Human approved main-scene-freeze; continue management/settings stage.

ui-management-image-and-list.last_summary: Management image/list windows already aligned with unified shell baseline; verification passed via Debug build and ui-mode smoke.

ui-management-settings-dialog-family.last_summary: Settings dialog family remains on unified shell/form baseline with no persistence/schema change; verification passed via Settings|Configuration tests and ui-mode smoke.

ui-dialog-tail-pass.last_summary: Dialog tail windows stay on compact unified baseline and preserve owner/topmost semantics; verification passed via Debug build and ui-mode smoke.

fullscreen-float-freeze-gate.last_summary: Human approved fullscreen/float freeze; continue final visual regression stage.

final-visual-regression-gate.last_summary: Human approved final visual regression gate; ui-window-system automatable flow closed.

ui-visual-regression-stage.last_summary: Final visual regression stage verified: ui-mode smoke PASS and governing reconciliation status OK.
